{ "name": "watson/sitemap", "description": "Generate Google Sitemaps in Laravel", "keywords": [ "laravel", "sitemaps" ], "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Dwight Watson", "email": "dwightwatson@studious.com.au" } ], "require": { "php": "^8.0", "illuminate/http": "^8.0|^9.0|^10.0|^11.0|^12.0", "illuminate/support": "^8.0|^9.0|^10.0|^11.0|^12.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0|^10.5", "mockery/mockery": "^1.3.1" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Watson\\": "src/Watson" } }, "extra": { "laravel": { "providers": [ "Watson\\Sitemap\\SitemapServiceProvider" ], "aliases": { "Sitemap": "Watson\\Sitemap\\Facades\\Sitemap" } } } }
